role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within the domain of script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (Mediterranean scrub, mountains).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Bougainvillea, broadleaf shrubs) and their native ranges.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed infrastructure standards (concrete block walls, unpaved lanes) and road markings.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (architecture, fencing style) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Albania. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence, particularly regarding the specific architectural style (unfinished concrete) and vegetation. The tournament logic effectively used this evidence to distinguish Albania from its closest neighbors (Greece, North Macedonia).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of mountains and scrub match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of pink flowering shrubs and trees match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of concrete walls and gravel paths match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of architectural details (flat roofs, unfinished concrete) match the image.
